repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: All folios darkened by use on outer upper and lower margins | Palimpsest in margins often appears with raised surface structure
Leather on wood, Greek binding, remains of metal clasps on front cover, remains of leather straps on back cover | Spine partially exposed
Not produced at Sinai; according to the fragmentary colophon on fol. 256v, the codex was “sent to Mt. Sinai” by a certain David
